description:
Professional lighting and sensor planning

Standard-compliant planning and simulation of artificial light, daylight and sensors in real time. For beginners and professionals in lighting planning. Intuitive operation, simple and fast display of the calculation values.
CHANGED

Optimized graphics in summary reports.

FIXED

Window close buttons in non-tabbed full-window mode.
Real-time Rendering: textures work again.
Raytracing: Saving images works again.
An issue where symbols (e.g., suspension cables or luminaire arrows) were incorrectly rendered in the foreground or visible through other objects
ReluxTunnel: Luminaire list works again.
Missing solids when importing DWG files.
Crash when selecting pCon Materials.
Views not keeping their maximized state when changing room items in floor tree.
Missing initial rotation angle when creating 3D rows, e.g. staircases.
